title: Settings
description: Tune template-level preferences and common behavior.

notification.label: System Notification
notification.test_body: The Electron main process can show system notifications.

auto_check.label: Auto check on startup
auto_check.desc: Silently checks GitHub Releases after startup and only notifies when a new version exists.

show_changelog.label: Show changelog
show_changelog.desc: When a new version exists, try to fetch CHANGELOG.md and show related entries.

update.target_repo_desc: After copying the template, configure the target repo through .env, package.json template.update, and app constants.
